name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off when you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — no hard feelings at all, life gets busy and dental care shouldn't feel like pressure.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's a little thank-you for giving us a try in the first place: 20% off your next visit with code {{coupon.code}}.

It's good for the next 14 days. Just mention it (or pop it in at checkout) the next time you book.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely love to hear about it — hit reply and it comes straight to us. We read every message.

Take care of those teeth,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up, your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is only good for a few more days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
